uiBuilder.label: Selected Product Summary
uiBuilder.description: A selected-product summary bar (icon, product name, star, subtitle) with a Change Product action that opens a confirmation modal. Composes now-icon + now-button + now-modal.

properties.name: productPrefix
properties.label: Product label prefix
properties.description: Text shown before the product name (e.g. "Product:"). Leave empty to show only the name.

properties.name: subtitle
properties.label: Subtitle
properties.description: Secondary line under the product name.
properties.defaultValue: Base limits and clauses applied from selected product

properties.name: icon
properties.label: Leading icon
properties.description: now-icon name shown at the start of the bar. Leave empty to hide.

properties.name: showStar
properties.label: Show star
properties.description: When on, shows a star after the product name (e.g. a recommended indicator).

properties.name: starIcon
properties.label: Star icon
properties.description: now-icon name for the star indicator.

properties.name: changeButtonLabel
properties.label: Change button label
properties.description: Label for the action button on the bar.

properties.name: confirmMessage
properties.label: Confirm dialog message
properties.description: Body text of the confirmation modal.
properties.defaultValue: Changing the product will archive all existing quote options. This action cannot be undone.

properties.name: confirmIcon
properties.label: Confirm dialog icon
properties.description: now-icon name shown beside the confirmation message (warning glyph). Leave empty to hide.

properties.name: confirmLabel
properties.label: Confirm button label
properties.description: Primary (confirm) button label in the modal footer.

properties.name: cancelLabel
properties.label: Cancel button label
properties.description: Secondary (cancel) button label in the modal footer.

actions.name: CHANGE_PRODUCT_REQUESTED
actions.label: Change product requested
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks Change Product (the confirmation modal opens).

actions.name: CHANGE_PRODUCT_CONFIRMED
actions.label: Change product confirmed
actions.description: Fired when the user confirms the change in the modal (primary action). Use this to archive existing quote options and return to product selection.

payload.name: productName
payload.label: Product name
payload.description: The product being changed away from.

actions.name: CHANGE_PRODUCT_CANCELLED
actions.label: Change product cancelled
actions.description: Fired when the user cancels or dismisses the confirmation modal.
